description_long: This is a six-wheeled armored combat tactical vehicle with a long, forward-mounted cannon on a rotating turret. The vehicle's body is angular, with pronounced, sloped armor panels covering the front, sides, and rear, providing robust protection. The exterior is finished in a worn, matte blue paint, with visible weathering and edge highlights suggesting heavy use. The wheels are large and robust, designed for off-road and urban terrain, and are evenly spaced along the length of the chassis. The turret is centrally located and features a single, prominent hatch on top, with no visible secondary weapon mounts. There are no visible military markings, insignia, or camouflage patterns beyond the solid blue paint.
description: A six-wheeled, blue armored combat vehicle with a long cannon turret and sloped armor panels. The exterior is matte and weathered, with no visible markings or camouflage.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the long cannon, sloped front armor, and three large wheels on the visible side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the vehicle, rear armor, and the turret's hatch, with the cannon extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the rear armor, turret, and the right-side wheels, with the cannon pointing away.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cannon, sloped front armor, and the right-side wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts or hardpoints visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with sloped armor panels on the front, sides, and rear; thickness appears substantial, with no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid matte blue paint with weathering.
attribute_tire_type: Six large, all-terrain tires with moderate tread pattern; no visible reinforcement or chains.
